title: Debug Mode Enabled in Production
description: Running applications with debug mode enabled in production exposes stack traces, environment variables, and internal state to potential attackers (OWASP A05:2021 / CWE-94).

finding.message: Debug mode enabled at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Disable debug mode via environment-specific configuration; never hardcode DEBUG=True.
Use environment variables (e.g., FLASK_ENV=production) to control debug behavior.
Ensure CI/CD pipelines validate that debug flags are off before deploying to production.
Implement a configuration validation step at startup that rejects debug=true in production environments.
